# matomo_tagmanager_tag_tawkto (Resource)

Tawk.to lets you monitor and chat with visitors on your website.

## Example Usage

```terraform
provider "matomo" {}

resource "matomo_site" "example" {
  name = "Example TawkTo Site"
  urls = ["https://example-tawkto.example.com"]
}

resource "matomo_tagmanager_container" "example" {
  site_id = matomo_site.example.id
  context = "web"
  name    = "Example TawkTo Container"
}

resource "matomo_tagmanager_trigger" "example" {
  container_id = matomo_tagmanager_container.example.id
  type         = "PageView"
  name         = "Example TawkTo Trigger"
}

resource "matomo_tagmanager_tag_tawkto" "example" {
  container_id = matomo_tagmanager_container.example.id
  name         = "example-tawkto"
  fire_trigger_ids = [matomo_tagmanager_trigger.example.id]
  tawk_to_id = "example-value"
  tawk_to_widget_id = "example-value"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `container_id` (String)
- `fire_trigger_ids` (List of String)
- `name` (String)
- `tawk_to_id` (String) You can get the Site ID by logging into Tawk.to, going to "Administration" and clicking on "Property Settings". The Site ID has typically about 25 characters, for example "123451c27295ad739e46b6b1".
- `tawk_to_widget_id` (String) You can get the Widget ID by logging into Tawk.to, going to "Administration" and clicking on "Chat Widget" and selecting an appropriate widget. The widget ID can be retrieved from "Direct Chat Link" as https://tawk.to/chat/{SITE_ID}/{WIDGET_ID}.

### Optional

- `block_trigger_ids` (List of String)
- `status` (String)

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
